productDisplayName: Carrera Men Rubber strap dial Black Watches
description: carrera has been in the watch industry for more than five decades and they have proven themselves as masters in the art of creating high quality timepieces. The new range of carrera watches are a fresh take on their classic drivers& rsquo and racers& rsquo watch models and perfect for urban wear. Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 9 mm Dial shape: Square Stainless steel case with coating Textured rubber strap with branding Tang clasp with brand inscription Fixed stainless steel bezel for added durability and style Metallic hands with red tip Black busy dial with metallic numbers Three sub dials with stop watches Automated reading with date Metallic crown to adjust time/date/day Water resistant at 100 meters, making it suitable for swimming, white water rafting, non-snorkelling water related work, and fishing
